case_title: JENNIFER M. LEE VS. TRITERRA REALTY GROUP INC.

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY LEE, JENNIFER M. TRITERRA REALTY GROUP INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-05-2018 BY PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER M. LEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TRITERRA REALTY GROUP IS PRESENT AND REPRESENTED BY HALEY GONZABA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00- SERVED AUG-16-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TRITERRA REALTY GROUP INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $690.52 FILED BY LEE, JENNIFER M. AS TO DEFENDANT TRITERRA REALTY GROUP INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRITERRA REALTY GROUP INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, JENNIFER M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRITERRA REALTY GROUP INC. $650.52 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $680.52 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
